title: sphaerostigma campestre
intro: Sphaerostigma campestre, also known as Donkey's Tail or Donkey's Ears, is a small, annual herb native to Australia and parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Sphaerostigma campestre include relief from respiratory problems, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Sphaerostigma campestre is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
